00027 #ifndef JELATINE_UTF8_STRING_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_UTF8_STRING_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "util.h"
00033 
00034 /******************************************************************************
00035  * String manager interface                                                   *
00036  ******************************************************************************/
00037 
00038 extern void string_manager_init(size_t, size_t);
00039 extern char *utf8_intern(const char *, size_t);
00040 
00041 extern bool utf8_check(const char *);
00042 extern size_t utf8_to_java_length(const char *);
00043 extern void utf8_to_java(uint16_t *, const char *);
00044 extern char *java_to_utf8(const uint16_t *, size_t);
00045 extern char *utf8_slashify(char *);
00046 
00047 #if JEL_PRINT
00048 extern void string_manager_print( void );
00049 extern size_t string_manager_size( void );
